title: Biome Water Backport
description: Backports biome tints to water on 1.7.10
body:
This pack backports biome tints to water on 1.7.10, it requires MCPatcher or Optifine.

Load this pack above [Modern Texture Backport](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modern-texture-backport).

It has three versions:
1. Java | Uses Java Edition biome water colors
2. Bedrock | Uses Bedrock Edtion biome water colors
3. Hybrid | Mainly uses Java Edition biome water colors, but uses Bedrock Edition water colors in some biomes that Java Edition doesn't color differently.
